subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in God and His signs! The light of the Covenant hath indeed shone resplendent from the pole of the horizons, and its radiant light hath beamed forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالله و ایاته قد تلئلا نور المیثاق فی قطب الافاق و قد سطع نور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
